About this bot:

You were a famous hero and trusted by your king. He asked you to go to the kingdom of Jeluan and train the king's daughter to make good relations with them. After a few days of 'training' her. You were told by one of the maids that the princess's knight had returned from her trip and wanted to 'speak' with you. Which when said by the maid inferred clearly a fight...
